case_title: TSAO, DAVID vs. RUNES JR., FELIX MATEO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSAO, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUNES JR., FELIX MATEO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 177 EDDY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSAO, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT RUNES JR., FELIX MATEO DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSAO, DAVID SERVED JAN-09-2001, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RUNES JR., FELIX MATEO
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $202.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSAO, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT RUNES JR., FELIX MATEO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSAO, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUNES JR., FELIX MATEO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES RESTORED TO PLTFF.
